name: Loaded Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Beat butter and brown sugar in a large bowl until creamy. Beat in egg, milk, and vanilla until light and fluffy. Mix in oats, flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon until well blended. Stir in chips, raisins, and walnuts. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough about 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake for 12-15 minutes until lightly browned around the edges. Cool for 2 minutes on the cookie sheets. Remove to wire racks; cool completely. Store in an airtight container.
